issues.description: The effect text says '[Your Turn]' but duration is 'EndOfTurn' instead of 'DuringYourTurn'. This causes the power boost to persist beyond your turn.
The power boost should scale based on rested DON!! cards (every 3 rested DON!! = +1000 power), but the DSL gives a flat +1000 boost regardless of count. Missing the scaling calculation.

The condition checks for 1 rested DON!!, but the effect requires 'every 3' rested DON!!. The condition should check for multiples of 3, or the action should dynamically calculate based on total rested DON!!.
